raw_text: Y. Bai, K. Li, and G. Wang, "A Hybrid Quadrotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Control Strategy Using Self-Adaptive Bald Eagle Search and Fuzzy Logic," (in English), Electronics, vol. 14, no. 11, pp. 2112, 2

paper_info.title: A Hybrid Quadrotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Control Strategy Using Self-Adaptive Bald Eagle Search and Fuzzy Logic
paper_info.abstract: In this study, we propose an innovative inner–outer loop control framework for a quadcopter unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that significantly enhances the trajectory-tracking speed and accuracy while enhancing robustness against external disturbances.
